title: grounded configuration
description: Configuration for grounded — Claude Code hooks that enforce tool usage and prevent hallucinations. All fields are optional; missing keys fall back to package defaults.

$schema.description: JSON Schema reference (enables editor autocomplete and validation).

mode.description:
Global enforcement mode.
• safe — adaptive thresholds via scoring engine (default)
• strict — scope warnings become blocks, freshness always blocks
• autonomous — loop threshold = 1, all checks hard-block
• silent — zero context injection, only hard blocks (production agents)

hooks.description: Per-hook on/off toggles. Note: anti-bypass and policy-guard are always on and not configurable here.

promptInject.description: Inject enforcement rules + CLAUDE.md snippet on UserPromptSubmit.

preFlight.description: Detect intent and inject required tool sequence plan.

editGuard.description: Read-before-edit gate + old_string verification on Edit/Write/MultiEdit.

readTracker.description: Track Read/Grep/Glob calls to feed sequence-aware checks.

loopDetector.description: Detect repeated tool+input hashes; persistent cross-session memory.

scopeGuard.description: Block sensitive files, system paths, and out-of-project writes.

freshnessCheck.description: Block edits when file mtime is newer than last Read timestamp.

confidenceCheck.description: Verify identifiers claimed in the final response actually exist (rg/grep).

truthLayer.description: Inject explicit "X does NOT exist" facts when Grep returns empty.

threshold.description: Number of identical tool+input calls before a loop is flagged.

windowSize.description: How many recent calls are kept for hash-based comparison.

maxAgeMs.description: Max staleness (ms) of the last Read before an edit is treated as stale. Default 5 minutes.

requireReadBeforeEdit.description: When true, block Edit/MultiEdit on files that were not previously read in this session. Does NOT apply to Write on new files (creating a new file never requires a prior Read).

mode.description: warn — show warning but allow; block — hard-block out-of-scope writes. Sensitive files (.env, *.key) and system paths are ALWAYS hard-blocked regardless of this setting.

extraAllowedRoots.description: Additional absolute paths considered in-scope for writes (e.g. shared scratch dirs).

blockedPaths.description: Path prefixes that are always blocked from edits/writes.

noEdit.description: Path substrings or globs that may never be edited (e.g. "vendor/", "*.lock").

requireTestRead.description: When true, require reading a test file in the same module before editing implementation code.
